prompt: A soft, editorial-style outdoor fashion photograph of a woman standing in a wildflower meadow in the mountains during daylight, shown from behind with her body turned slightly three-quarters to the side and her head angled back toward the camera. She has shoulder-length to mid-back tousled dark blonde hair, windblown and slightly messy. Her face is fully obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in a warm beige-brown tone. She wears a delicate, sheer white lace outfit consisting of 2 visible pieces: a long-sleeved semi-transparent floral lace top with ruffled cuffs and high-waisted white lace bottoms. The pose is relaxed and sensual, one arm hanging down and the other resting near her hip. Surround her with dense natural grasses and blooming wildflowers, including visible white daisies and small yellow flowers in the foreground and midground. Place her in front of rolling green and golden hills with dramatic chalky white cliff faces and erosion lines across the background. Use a wide open landscape, partly cloudy blue sky, warm natural sunlight, earthy tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, realistic photography, high detail, soft contrast, and a dreamy bohemian countryside mood.
